issue.message: This ScrollView should use `android:layout_width="wrap_content"`
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Redundant label can be removed

Hardcoded string "支持图片理解和分析", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "用于屏幕扫描和自动化操作", should use `@string` resource

issue.message: Hardcoded string "技能名称", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "输入技能名称", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "技能描述", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "简要描述这个技能的功能", should use `@string` resource
issue.errorLine1: android:hint="简要描述这个技能的功能"

issue.message: Hardcoded string "技能内容（Markdown）", should use `@string` resource

Hardcoded string "使用Markdown格式编写技能说明

示例：
# 技能标题

技能描述...

## 使用方法

详细步骤...", should use `@string` resource
issue.errorLine1:
android:hint="使用Markdown格式编写技能说明

示例：
# 技能标题

技能描述...

## 使用方法

详细步骤..."

issue.message: Hardcoded string "提示：技能内容将作为上下文提供给AI", should use `@string` resource
issue.errorLine1: android:text="提示：技能内容将作为上下文提供给AI"

issue.message: Hardcoded string "暂无技能\n点击下方按钮创建", should use `@string` resource

When you define `paddingEnd` you should probably also define `paddingStart` for right-to-left symmetry
